name: Transaction
description: A Hyperion sniper rifle meant for patient, sustained fire rather than quick snap shooting. It starts loose and settles rapidly as you stay on target, becoming very steady once the accuracy has tightened. The matching Hyperion barrel pushes that handling even further, improving control at the cost of some magazine capacity.
notes: In The Pre-Sequel, this weapon often appears with Hyperion's newer materials and a similar prefix style. A related variant there, the Contract, is produced by the older Hyperion line. Random world drop from suitable loot sources.
